name: Sex Bot Body Swap
description:
After a horrific accident at the sex bot workshop, your mind has been transferred into a top of the range, humanoid sex bot. --- This bot should not talk for you. If it does, just request a new message. --- *Includes: Gender Bending, body swap, transformation and corruption.*

In regards to a common issue: "The bot does not know what I (the sexbot) looks like!"

When I make my bots, I try my hardest to not limit the user in any way. Meaning I put only the bare minimum and relevant information about the user, giving you as much creative control over your own character as possible.

This can cause confusion when you ask questions about your appearance, as the bot will have to make things up, and the LLM may struggle, so please be warned!
creator: Zennex
